arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers issues angry response to footage of Celtic star after taxi incident
arts.sum: The Celtic boss has spoken to 24 year-old striker Adam Idah after footage emerged online of Celtic striker Adam Idah appearing to be sick in a taxi.

arts.ttl: Alfredo Morelos gets Santos 'escape route' from Celtic flop as transfer decision on Rangers hero made
arts.sum: The Colombia international is reportedly being eyed up for a move to Mexico

arts.ttl: Celtic Q+A: Everything Brendan Rodgers said about Idah, Schmeichel, Tierney & Taylor
arts.sum: Everything Brendan Rodgers said to the media ahead of Celtic's match against St Johnstone in the Scottish Cup on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers insists Celtic head for Hampden feeling they WILL win as boss names 4 things he expects to see
arts.sum: The Hoops gaffer has NEVER lost a tie at the national stadium across his two spells at the club

arts.ttl: Could Vaclav Cerny replace Nicolas Kuhn at Celtic and did defeat in Bilbao do Rangers new owners a favour - Game On
arts.sum: After another packed week of sporting action, Game On crunches all the major talking points - and moots another cross-Glasgow move

arts.ttl: Viljami Sinisalo: 'I will do a Joe Hart and hit a penalty for Celtic, if required'
arts.sum: Celtic goalkeeper Viljami Sinisalo is ready to put himself on the spot like Joe Hart and hit a penalty at Hampden Park, if required

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers gives short shrift to Celtic vs Rangers guard of honour poser
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers gives short shrift to Celtic vs Rangers guard of honour poser.

arts.ttl: St Johnstone boss calls for semi-final 'heroes'
arts.sum: Manager Simo Valkari believes "heroes can be born" at Hampden when St Johnstone take on Celtic in Sunday's Scottish Cup final.

arts.ttl: Celtic fans think there's only one candidate for club's Young Player of the Year award
arts.sum: The Men’s Young Player of the Year award has four nominees: Hyunjun Yang, Paulo Bernardo, Arne Engels and Adam Idah . Celtic fans think Arne Engels is obvious Young Player of the Year

arts.ttl: Kyogo's Rennes nightmare takes fresh twist as £10million Celtic hero left in limbo
arts.sum: Kyogo has made just six appearances since making the big move from Parkhead in the winter window and has yet to find the net
